name: MCDParamResponse
title: MCDParamResponse
syntax: long MCDParamResponse ( char moduleName[], char parameterName[], double value)
description: Callback handler on a MCDGetECUParam request. This function must be defined in the CAPL program to get a response on a read request.

parameters.name: moduleName
parameters.description: Name of the module that is configured in the global options dialog External Programs|MCD 3D Server.
